prompt: Keep the draft inside Enron, ask Gerald Nemec and Sara Shackleton for review, and hold the outside send.
summary: Debra Perlingiere keeps the draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement inside Enron and circulates it for internal review. She asks Gerald Nemec and Sara Shackleton to review and explicitly instructs that the draft not be sent externally to Cargill until internal comments are resolved.

messages.subject: Master Agreement
messages.body_text: Gerald — Attached is a draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement intended for Cargill. Please review the commercial and credit-related provisions and send me any redlines or comments. Do not forward this outside Enron; please hold any external distribution to Cargill until we finalize internal comments. Thanks, Debra
messages.rationale: Route the draft to the internal commercial/credit reviewer and prevent premature external transmission.

messages.subject: Master Agreement
messages.body_text: Sara — Attached is the draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement we were going to send to Cargill. Please review legal terms, indemnities, and assignment language and advise any required edits. Keep this internal and do not forward outside Enron. I appreciate your comments. Debra
messages.rationale: Obtain internal legal review and explicitly instruct counsel to hold the outside send until legal and credit comments are resolved.

notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
